testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 2 code style errors / warnings: ./examples_rclpy_minimal_client/client_async_callback.py:33:9: F824 `nonlocal cli` is unused: name is never assigned in scope ./examples_rclpy_minimal_client/client_async_callback.py:33:9: F824 `nonlocal node` is unused: name is never assigned in scope assert 1 == 0

testcase.failure: test/test_flake8.py:23: in test_flake8 assert rc == 0, \ E AssertionError: Found 2 code style errors / warnings: E ./examples_rclpy_minimal_client/client_async_callback.py:33:9: F824 `nonlocal cli` is unused: name is never assigned in scope E ./examples_rclpy_minimal_client/client_async_callback.py:33:9: F824 `nonlocal node` is unused: name is never assigned in scope E assert 1 == 0
